results.rendered_html:
pāriṣada (von pariṣad)
1〉 adj. pā˚ = pariṣada idam =  P. 4,3,123 . ˚da = pariṣadi sādhuḥ  SIDDH. K. _zu_ P. 4,4,101 . m. Beisitzer in einer Rathsverversammlung  ŚABDAR. _im_ ŚKDR.   N. 18,4 .  MBH. 5,1417 .  PAÑCAT. 156,18 . pl. das Gefolge eines Gottes  MBH. 2,414 . 416 . 3,9949 . 14330 . 14387 .  R. 3,35,107 .  AK. 1,1,1,31 .  BHĀG. P. 7,8,39 .  MALLIN. _zu_ KUMĀRAS. 7,95 .  H. 201 , Sch. rudrasya mahāpāriṣadāḥ  HARIV. 13631 . 13643 .  MBH. 9,2526 . mahāpāriṣada sg. 2527 .
— 2〉 oxyt. adj. von pariṣad N. pr. eines Dorfes im Norden (diese Bed. ist u. pariṣad hinzuzufügen) gaṇa paladyādi zu  P. 4,2,110 .
— 3〉 n. die Theilnahme an einer Versammlung  BHĀG. P. 1,16,17 ; vgl. pāraṣada.

results.rendered_html:
pāriṣada a. (dī f.) Belonging to an assembly or council.
— daḥ
1 A person present at an assembly, a member of an assembly, such as an assessor.
2 A king's companion.
— dāḥ (m. pl.) The retinue of a god.
— daṃ Taking part in an assembly.
